        intro m v
        have h₁ : lineDerivCLM (m • v) T f = m • lineDerivCLM v T f := by
          have h₂ : lineDerivCLM (m • v) T f = T (-TestFunction.lineDerivCLM (m • v) f) := by
            simp [lineDerivCLM]
          have h₃ : (m • lineDerivCLM v T f : 𝓓'(Ω, F)) = m • T (-TestFunction.lineDerivCLM v f) := by
            simp [lineDerivCLM]
            <;> simp_all [smul_smul]
          have h₄ : (T (-TestFunction.lineDerivCLM (m • v) f) : 𝓓'(Ω, F)) = m • T (-TestFunction.lineDerivCLM v f) := by
            have h₅ : TestFunction.lineDerivCLM (m • v) f = m • TestFunction.lineDerivCLM v f := by
              -- Use the homogeneity of TestFunction.lineDerivCLM
              simp [TestFunction.lineDerivCLM.map_smul]
            have h₆ : -TestFunction.lineDerivCLM (m • v) f = - (m • TestFunction.lineDerivCLM v f) := by
              rw [h₅]
              <;> simp
            have h₇ : -TestFunction.lineDerivCLM (m • v) f = m • (-TestFunction.lineDerivCLM v f) := by
              calc
                -TestFunction.lineDerivCLM (m • v) f = - (m • TestFunction.lineDerivCLM v f) := by rw [h₅] <;> simp
                _ = - (m • TestFunction.lineDerivCLM v f) := rfl
                _ = m • (-TestFunction.lineDerivCLM v f) := by
                  simp [smul_smul, sub_eq_add_neg]
                  <;>
                  simp_all [neg_smul]
                  <;>
                  ring_nf

                  simp_all [smul_smul]
            rw [h₇]
            have h₈ : T (m • (-TestFunction.lineDerivCLM v f)) = m • T (-TestFunction.lineDerivCLM v f) := by
              apply ContinuousLinearMap.map_smul
            rw [h₈]
          calc
            lineDerivCLM (m • v) T f = T (-TestFunction.lineDerivCLM (m • v) f) := by rw [h₂]
            _ = m • T (-TestFunction.lineDerivCLM v f) := by rw [h₄]
            _ = m • lineDerivCLM v T f := by
